system.effect: The psyker causes the target's blood vessels to violently burst, dealing 1d10 Energy damage that ignores armour and Toughness Bonus. If the target takes damage, it must pass a Toughness test or suffer Blood Loss.

description.value: The psyker reaches out with his mind and causes the target's blood to boil and vessels to rupture from within. The target suffers 1d10 Energy damage, plus Psy Rating, ignoring armour and Toughness Bonus. If the target suffers any damage, it must pass a Toughness test or also suffer the Blood Loss condition. If the target dies from this power, its corpse may explode, potentially affecting those nearby.
